prestazioni: Engine: 6.1L Hemi ESF (SRT-8 specific block, forged crankshaft, high-strength connecting rods) with a custom camshaft upgrade from Comp Cams (276°/282° duration, 0.600" lift, 114° LSA) paired with a ported and polished cylinder head featuring Ferrea Competition Series valves (2.08" intake, 1.60" exhaust) and upgraded valve springs (PSI 1511) for high-RPM stability up to 7,200 RPM.

Forced Induction: Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285CE turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a custom-built intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (1,200 CFM core, 3.5" thick, 24" x 12" x 5.5" dimensions) and a TiAL MV-R 50mm wastegate to manage boost at 18 PSI, supported by a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump and ID1000x injectors for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Quaife ATB differential (SRT-8 specific 3.91 gear ratio) with a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc clutch (26-spline, 6-puck carbon/copper hybrid disc) and a Getrag V160 6-speed transmission swap with a custom bellhousing adapter. Suspension features KW Clubsport coilovers (2-way adjustable, 400 lb/in front springs, 600 lb/in rear springs) with Hotchkis Sport sway bars (27mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full kit, including subframe mounts).
estetica: Widebody Conversion: RK Sport Magnum SRT-8 widebody kit (fiberglass construction, 2.5" wider front fenders, 3.5" wider rear fenders) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser from APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3-piece design with adjustable dive planes).

Wheel & Brake Setup: Forgeline GA3R 20x10.5" (front) and 20x12" (rear) wheels with a 5x115 bolt pattern, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 315/30/20 rear). Braking system features Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (front, 380mm rotors) and 4-piston calipers (rear, 355mm rotors) with G-Force brake lines and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.

Exterior & Interior Styling: Custom vinyl wrap in 3M Gloss Flip Psychedelic (color-shifting purple-to-teal) with a matte black roof and mirror caps. Interior features Recaro Pole Position seats (SRT-8 specific, carbon fiber backs) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), and a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (8-point, mild steel, bolt-in design with harness bar).
